positive: A minimalist, stylized depiction of a whimsical woodland scene featuring a glowing crescent moon, a cluster of bioluminescent mushrooms, and silhouetted deer drinking from a calm stream. The style should be a sophisticated blend of Art Nouveau and Japanese Ukiyo-e woodblock prints, using high contrast and limited, rich colors (deep indigo, emerald green, gold leaf accents, and bone white). Focus on clean lines, dramatic negative space, and a harmonious circular composition perfect for a central apparel print. Studio lighting, extremely detailed ink work, vector quality, high resolution, symmetrical composition.
